race.description: Ultra Fleet Country Boosted Showcase Hcp (Bm58)
race.comment: ELLOFADUDE (6) has settled midfield and made some impression without threatening in his two runs this time in work. Draws a better alley and steps up in trip today so a peak performance looks on the cards. VENDOR (8) returned from a 24-week spell with a dogged win in a 1200m Quirindi maiden last time out. Ex-Godolphin who has taken a while to hit his straps but can go on with the job now. ORSUM (4) raced handy and defeated a red hot favourite over a similar trip to this at Muswellbrook recently. The winner of four races in this distance range. Capable of holding the form at just the third run of the campaign. DUB (1) wasn't far away when resuming and always improves at the second run back.
